# Semantic conventions for network-app-synthetics-tests metrics

This page documents metric semantic conventions for this ThousandEyes section.

## `metric.http.metrics.availability`
<!-- semconv metric.http.metrics.availability -->
<!-- NOTE: THIS TEXT IS AUTOGENERATED. DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. -->
<!-- see templates/registry/markdown/snippet.md.j2 -->
<!-- prettier-ignore-start -->

| Name | Instrument Type | Unit (UCUM) | Description | Stability | Entity Associations |
| -------- | --------------- | ----------- | -------------- | --------- | ------ |
| `http.metrics.availability` | Gauge | `%` | Calculated depending on the errors reported during the test. In case there is any error, the availability is 0, otherwise 100%. | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | [`thousandeyes.stream`](entities/thousandeyes.md#thousandeyes-stream) |
